name: Vylon Element
name_jp: ヴァイロン・エレメント
desc: When any face-up "Vylon" Equip Card(s) you control are destroyed (except during the Damage Step): You can Special Summon an equal or lower number of "Vylon" Tuner monsters from your Deck. They cannot be used as Synchro Material Monsters, except for the Synchro Summon of a "Vylon" Synchro Monster.
eff: When any face-up "Vylon" Equip Card(s) you control are destroyed (except during the Damage Step): You can Special Summon an equal or lower number of "Vylon" Tuner monsters from your Deck. They cannot be used as Synchro Material Monsters, except for the Synchro Summon of a "Vylon" Synchro Monster.

action: Activates if destroyed by card effect
summoning: Cannot be used as a Synchro Material
